name: sparkline-chart
title: Sparkline Chart
description: Single-line vertical-bar mini-chart over a float64 series. Maps each value to one of eight unicode block heights (▁▂▃▄▅▆▇█), auto-scales the y-range from data, and renders an optional label prefix and latest-value suffix.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New(theme.Default). Feed data with WithValues([]float64{...}). The chart auto-scales the y-range from the data; pin either side with WithMin(v) or WithMax(v). When the series is longer than WithWidth the rightmost width values render so the chart reads as a fixed-width window over recent data. WithLatest(true) appends the most-recent value after the bars; format with WithLatestFormat and add units via WithLatestSuffix. WithLabel sets a muted prefix. Latest() returns the last value plus a non-empty bool. Range() returns the effective (lo, hi) used to scale values. The chart is a value type with no Update; redraw by replacing the chart and rendering View().
